race.comment: MAMUSHKA (4) has been freshened up since she was nailed on the line over this trip at Warwick Farm on Australia Day. Genuine mare who has the gate speed to cross from the wide draw. Likely to enjoy a soft lead and will be very hard to reel in. FIDDLERS GREEN (2) missed by a whisker when fresh from a spell in a comparable race to this at the Kensington track five weeks ago. Not seen since so be wary of any negative market moves. On face value looks a terrific chance to go one better. MY PHAR LADY (10) was excellent two back over today's journey at the Kenso then failed to run out a strong mile most recently. Very fit mare who finds the right race to bounce back to form. CLANCY (1) disappointed last time but is lightly raced and cannot be sacked after one bad performance. The lightly raced PICTOR (5) is back from a 16-week spell. Blinkers on for the first time right after the break is a sign of intent from the Waller camp.
